body.title: CLOSED: pipeline LLM calls missing is_user_turn — Ollama stall on web turns
body.result: Fixed: is_user_turn=True in LLMPeerAdvisor (interactive level) and LLMVoiceActor; MSG|ch= CSB filter added. Commit b0404ad4.
body.description:
LLMPeerAdvisor and LLMVoiceActor in the TurnPipeline called gateway.reason() without is_user_turn, defaulting to False. For interactive-level turns this sent the call to Ollama (local/interactive, 9-minute stall) instead of cloud. Web human messages going through the pipeline were silent for up to 9 minutes and then returned CSB garbage.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/llm_peer_advisor.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/voice_ab.py, wild_igor/igor/main.py
**Design rules:** D259 (is_user_turn gate), D254 (human turns → cloud direct)
**Scope boundary:** Fix is_user_turn in both pipeline LLM callers; add MSG|ch= CSB echo filter
**Test plan:** Manual: web message routes to cloud after fix (verified by last_tier=cloud/interactive in logs). Suite: 1363 passing.
